Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Alliance (The Last Horizon)]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Captain ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 5''' — The Alliance has territory that is considered hazardous.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 5''' — The Last Horizon is identified as originating in Alliance space.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 37''' — The Iron Legion appears to be abandoning the Alliance.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 38''' — The Alliance calls the nearest system Fifty-Three X.}}

== The Engineer ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 12''' — The Alliance is a group mentioned by Shyrax.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 32''' — The Alliance offers help at generous rates if one goes to Karosha in person.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 33''' — Alliance intelligence reports agree that Queen Shyrax took Mell.}}

== The Knight ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 9''' — Jan used to do freelance work for the Alliance.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 11''' — The narrator and their companions are wanted in the Alliance.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 12''' — Rifles issued by the Alliance are magically shielded.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 13''' — The Alliance hates the narrator and Raion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 14''' — Raion is a prominent representative of Visiria who is not part of the Alliance.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 19''' — The Alliance is an existing group.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 34''' — A fleet of Alliance forces accompanied the Titan Knights.}}

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 1''' — The Alliance issues automatic rifles.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 26''' — The Last Horizon attacked the Alliance.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
